_comment: Public conformance cases for the Vyges Loom read-only (sign-off / verify / query) engines, driven through `vyges mcp`. Each `cwd` is relative and resolves against this file's directory (bundled fixtures under fixtures/). Confirm a tool's argument shape with `conformance.py --list-tools`. Cases with `skip` need heavier fixtures than this repo bundles.

cases.name: sta-si-signoff
cases.task: Run static-timing sign-off on the design described by seq.sta and tell me whether setup and hold timing are met.

cases.name: extract-parasitics
cases.task: Extract RC parasitics for the design in counter.ext and report the net count.

cases.name: gds-view-render
cases.task: Render the layout in sample.gds to an image.

cases.name: lvs-inverter-compare
cases.task: Run LVS for the job in extract.lvs and report whether the layout matches the schematic.

cases.name: power-estimate
cases.task: Estimate power for the design in counter.pwr and report total dynamic power.

cases.name: em-ir-signoff
cases.task: Run EM / IR-drop sign-off for the design in block.emir and report whether the IR-drop limit is met.

cases.name: thermal-analysis
cases.task: Run thermal analysis for the design in block.thermal and report the peak temperature.

cases.name: glitch-hazard-check
cases.task: Run glitch/hazard analysis on the netlist hazard.v using cells.lib and report the hazard count.

cases.name: lec-equivalence
cases.task: Run logical-equivalence checking between golden.v and revised_ok.v (using cells.lib) and report whether they are equivalent.

cases.name: drc-signoff
cases.task: Run DRC on the layout edge_sensor_glue.gds (a real taped-out sky130 block), with rule deck sky130-min.drc and top cell edge_sensor_glue, and report the violation count.

cases.name: cdc-check
cases.task: Run clock-domain-crossing checks on cdc_demo.v (using cells.lib and cdc_demo.sdc) and report unsynchronized crossings.

cases.name: char-run
cases.task: Run characterization for the job and report the model fit.
cases.skip: needs a char job fixture + ngspice and the PDK device models on the host

cases.name: meas-spectral-thd
cases.task: Measure the total harmonic distortion of the captured tone in tone.series and tell me whether it meets a -30 dB target. The capture is coherent with the fundamental on DFT bin 16; account for harmonics 2 through 5.

cases.name: opendb-wire-length
cases.task: In the OpenDB design database design.odb, report the total routed wire length (in DBU).
